title: Dts Bundle Executor Schema
description: Assemble TypeScript declaration bundle files from source

bundleSources.description: Source .d.ts files to concatenate (relative to project root).

artifactPath.description: Output path for the TypeScript artifacts bundle (relative to project root).

packagePath.description: Output path for the npm package bundle (relative to project root).

licenseTemplateFile.description: Path to the license header template file (relative to project root).

eulaUrl.description: EULA URL embedded in the license header.
